| succ m ih =>
    simp only [seq_eq_bind, map_eq_bind_pure_comp, evalDist_bind, PMF.bind_apply, evalDist_pure,
      PMF.pure_apply, mul_ite, mul_one, mul_zero, uniformSample]
    have h (z : Vector α (m + 1)) : (∑' (v : Vector α m), Pr[= v | ih] * ∑' (a : α),
        Pr[= a | $ᵗ α] * if Vector.push v a = z then 1 else 0) = Pr[= z.pop | ih] * Pr[= z.back | $ᵗ α] := by
      rw [tsum_eq_single z.pop]
      · rw [tsum_eq_single z.back]
        · simp
        · intro b hb
          rw [if_neg]
          rintro rfl
          exact hb (Vector.push_pop_back z).symm
      · intro v hv
        rw [tsum_zero]
        intro a
        rw [if_neg]
        rintro rfl
        exact hv (Vector.pop_push v a).symm
    rw [h x, h y, ih x.pop y.pop, SampleableType.probOutput_selectElem_eq x.back y.back]

    rw [ENNReal.tsum_eq_single x.pop, ENNReal.tsum_eq_single x.back]
    · rw [SampleableType.probOutput_selectElem_eq x.back y.back]
      exact congr_arg₂ (· * ·) (ih x.pop y.pop) rfl
    · intro b hb; simp [Vector.push_eq_push_iff, hb]
    · intro b hb; simp [Vector.push_eq_push_iff, hb]
